name: Warmup Routine
description:
Gain the Warmup Routine Summoner Spell.

Warmup Routine: Channel your inner dancer to increase your damage for the rest of the round.

name: Vanish
description:
Gain the Vanish Summoner Spell.

Vanish turns you Invisible.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Dealing damage to an enemy also damages their partner for <trueDamage>@DamageMod*100@% damage dealt true damage</trueDamage> if they're nearby.

name: Cerberus
description: Gain the <spellName>Hail of Blades</spellName> and <spellName>Press the Attack</spellName> Keystone Runes.

name: Typhoon
description: Your Attacks fire a bolt at an additional target dealing reduced damage and applying {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects.

name: Self Destruct
description: Start each round with a bomb attached to you. After @BombDelay@ seconds, it explodes, dealing massive true damage and Knocking Up nearby enemies.

name: Serve Beyond Death
description: The first time you would die each round, instead return to full Health, decaying over @DecayDuration@ seconds. Taking down an enemy champion while your Health is decaying stops the decay and sets your Health to <healing>@TriumphPercent@% max Health</healing>.

name: Undying Guard
description: Upon reviving with Cultivation of War, Zaahen deals damage to nearby enemies based on their current Health and knocks all targets back, becoming impervious to damage dealt by champions outside of the circle created and gains a brief burst of movement speed.

name: Quantum Computing
description: Periodically <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a massive slash around you, dealing <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage>. Enemies hit by the outer half are <status>Slowed</status>, take additional <physicalDamage>max Health physical damage</physicalDamage>, and you heal for a percent of the bonus damage.

name: Demon's Dance
description: Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying Keystone Runes.

name: Defensive Maneuvers
description:
Gain the Defensive Maneuvers Summoner Spell.

Defensive Maneuvers Casts both Summoner Barrier and Heal on you and your teammate.

name: Transmute: Chaos
description: Gain 2 random Augments.

name: Chauffeur
description: You are attached to your ally and can't move on your own. Your <speed>bonus Move Speed</speed> is also granted to your ally, and you gain Ability Haste and <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

name: Marksmage
description: Your Attacks deal additional <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> equal to <scaleAP>@APRatio*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

name: Light Warden
description: Every few seconds, <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a warding light towards your ally, <shield>Shielding</shield> yourself and allies it passes through. It then returns, repeating the effect.

name: Quest: Mad Hatter
description:
Requirement: Wear @QuestThreshold@ hats at the end of combat.

Reward: Gain @AFPerHat@ Adaptive Force, @ArmorMRPerHat@ Armor and Magic Resist, @TenacityPerHat*100@% Tenacity, and @MSPerHat@ Movement Speed per hat.

Lose half of your hats when you lose a round.

name: Blade Waltz
description:
Gain the Blade Waltz Summoner Spell.

Blade Waltz makes you untargetable while you dash at and damage enemies @TotalHits@ times.

name: Willing Sacrifice
description: When your ally drops below <scaleHealth>@AllyHealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, trade some of your health for a <shield>Shield</shield> on your ally.

name: Firefox
description:
Autocast
Gain movement speed and conjure three flames that orbit you, targetting the closest visible enemy in range and dealing adaptive damage.

name: Summoner Revolution
description:
Your Summoner Spells gain an additional charge.

Additionally, Flash resets every round.

name: Ice Cold
description: Your <status>Slowing</status> effects reduce <speed>Move Speed</speed> by an extra 100.

name: Spin To Win
description: Your spin Abilities gain @SpinHaste@ Ability Haste and deal @SpinDamageAmp*100@% more damage!

name: Banner of Command
description:
Gain the Banner of Command Summoner Spell.

Banner of Command empowers your ally for a brief duration.

name: Tank It Or Leave It
description: You can <crit>Critically Defend</crit> using your Crit Chance (max @MaxChance*100@% chance), giving you a chance to reduce damage. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

name: Witchful Thinking
description: Gain <scaleAP>@AP@ Ability Power</scaleAP>.

name: Quest: Urf's Champion
description:
Requirement: Score @TakedownsNeeded@ takedowns.

Reward: Golden Spatula

name: Vengeance
description: After your partner dies, gain massively increased damage and <lifeSteal>Omnivamp</lifeSteal> for the remainder of the round.

name: Erosion
description: Damaging enemies adds a stacking <scaleArmor>Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> shred for @ShredDuration@s.

name: Stats!
description: Gain @AmountOfStatAnvils@ Stat Anvils!

name: Master of Duality
description: Your Attacks grant you <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} and your Abilities grant you <scaleAD>Attack Damage</scaleAD>, stacking infinitely until the end of the round.

name: Light 'em Up!
description: Every 4th Attack deals additional <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}.

name: Searing Dawn
description: Your Abilities mark enemies, causing them to take extra <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> from your ally's next Attack or Ability.

name: Slap Around
description: Each time you <status>Immobilize</status> or <status>Ground</status> an enemy, gain <font color = '#8347ff'>@AdaptiveForce@ Adaptive Force</font> for the round, stacking infinitely.

name: Magic Missile
description: Dealing damage with an Ability fires @NumberOfMissiles@ magic missiles at them, each dealing <trueDamage>percent max Health true damage</trueDamage> based on distance traveled.

name: Spellwake
description: Hitting enemies with Abilities creates a blast that deals <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> from you to the location you hit them.

name: Center of the Universe
description: Stars orbit you at your Attack Range, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies they pass through.

name: Phenomenal Evil
description:
Permanently gain @APPerProc@ Ability Power when you hit enemies with Abilities.

If taken as your second Augment, starts with @StartingAPIfSecondAugment@ Ability Power.

name: Big Brain
description: At the start of each round, gain<shield> @ShieldBase@ Shield </shield>for every <scaleAP>%i:scaleAP% @AP@ Ability Power</scaleAP>.

name: Vulnerability
description: Your Item and damage over time effects can Critically Strike. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit chance.

name: Cannon Fodder
description: You enter combat launching from a cannon.

name: Ultimate Roulette
description: Replace Summoner Flee with a random Ultimate. After casting the Ultimate, replace it with new random Ultimate.

name: Clown College
description:
Gain Deceive Summoner Spell.
Gain Backstab Passive.

When you die, spawn an exploding box that deals a large amount of true damage and Fear nearby enemies.

name: Numb to Pain
description: @MeleeReduction*100@% of damage you take instead happens over @BleedDuration@ seconds (@RangedReduction*100@% for ranged champions).

name: Augmented Power
description: Increase the damage done by your augments and items by @DamageAmp@.

name: Mad Scientist
description: On Round start you grow large (<font color = '#8347ff'>Adaptive Force</font> and <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>) or tiny (Ability Haste and <speed>Move Speed</speed>).

name: Mountain Soul
description: You gain the Mountain Soul, gaining a <shield>Shield</shield> after being out of combat for a short time.

name: Ultimate Revolution
description: Once per round, refresh your Ultimate Ability after casting it.

name: Trickster Demon
description: When you exit stealth explode for <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ Magic Damage</magicDamage>, your clones and traps will do the same on death.

name: Dematerialize
description:
Gain @AdaptiveForce@ Adaptive Force on takedown, once per champion per round.

If taken as your second Augment, starts with @SecondPickBonus@ Adaptive Force.

name: Slow and Steady
description: Your Attack Speed becomes @StaticRatio@. All Bonus Attack Speed is converted to Attack Damage. (@ADPerAS@AD per 1% AS).

name: Frost Wraith
description: Autocast Root nearby enemies for @RootDuration@ seconds every @Cooldown@ seconds.

name: Symphony of War
description: Gain the <spellName>Lethal Tempo</spellName> and <spellName>Conqueror</spellName> Keystone Runes.

name: Trueshot Prodigy
description: When you damage a champion from far away, fire a <abilityName>Trueshot Barrage</abilityName> at them.

name: Eureka
description: Gain Ability Haste equal to <scaleAP>@APToHasteConversion*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

name: Ocean Soul
description: Gain the Ocean Soul, granting high <healing>Health</healing> and <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> regen after damaging enemies.

name: Bodyguard
description: Using a dash, blink, or teleport grants yourself a <shield>shield</shield> for @ShieldDuration@ seconds, this shield is also granted to any allies you pass through. The strength of this <shield>shield</shield> depends on your abilities base cooldown at level 1.

name: Circle of Death
description: <healing>Healing</healing> and <healing>Health Regen</healing> you do deals a portion of the value as <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to the nearest enemy champion.

name: Quest: Wooglet's Witchcap
description:
Immediate: Gain Needlessly Large Rod.

Requirement: Possess Rabadon's Deathcap and Zhonya's Hourglass.

Reward: Gain Wooglet's Witchcap

name: Earthwake
description: Your dash, blink, or teleport Abilities leave behind a trail that detonates after 1 second.

name: Scoped Weapons
description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

name: Bread And Butter
description: Your @spell1KeyBind@ gains @QAbilityHaste@ Ability Haste.

name: The Brutalizer
description: Gain <scaleAD>@AD@ Attack Damage</scaleAD>, @AbilityHaste@ Ability Haste, and <scaleLethality>@Lethality@ Lethality</scaleLethality>.

name: Sonic Boom
description: Buffing, <healing>Healing</healing>, or <shield>Shielding</shield> your ally deals damage and <status>Slows</status> enemies surrounding them.

name: Twice Thrice
description: Every third Attack, your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects trigger a second time.

name: Symbiotic Mutation
description:
Every round this mutates into one of your ally's augments.

Only mutates into augments you could roll.

name: Celestial Body
description: Gain <scaleHealth>@Health@ Health</scaleHealth>, but you deal @DamageReduction*100@% less damage.

name: Bravest of the Brave
description: Increase future augment offerings by @tierValueIncrease@ tier. If the augments were already Prismatic tier, gain a bonus @GoldAmount@ gold.

name: Bread And Jam
description: Your @spell2KeyBind@ gains @WAbilityHaste@ Ability Haste.

name: With Haste
description: Gain <speed>Move Speed</speed> equal to @AbilityHasteToMSConversion*100@% of your Ability Haste.

name: Fallen Aegis
description:
Start combat with a Black Shield for @ShieldDuration@s.

Black Shield blocks Magic Damage and Immobilizing effects.

name: Holy Fire
description: <healing>Healing</healing> or <shield>Shielding</shield> applies an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to a nearby enemy, dealing <magicDamage>percent max Health magic damage</magicDamage> over a few seconds.

name: Overflow
description: Your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> costs double. Your Ability <healing>Heals</healing>, <shield>Shields</shield>, and damage are increased based on your <scaleMana>max Mana</scaleMana>.

name: Feel the Burn
description:
Gain the Feel the Burn Summoner Spell.

Feel the Burn casts Ignite and Exhaust on all nearby enemy champions.

name: Guilty Pleasure
description: <status>Immobilizing</status> or <status>Grounding</status> enemy champions <healing>heals you</healing>.

name: Scopier Weapons
description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

name: Buff Buddies
description: You gain <font color = '#f30c1a'>Crest of Cinders</font> and <font color = '#1542ea'>Crest of Insight</font>.

name: Raid Boss
description: You start each round imprisoned in the center of the arena, unable to act. While imprisoned, you have massive damage reduction and accumulate size, <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>, <physicalDamage>Attack Damage</physicalDamage>, and <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> over time. After @ImprisonDuration@ seconds or reaching <scaleHealth>@BreakoutHealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, you break out, <status>Knocking Back</status> enemies and gaining <shield>Shield</shield> based on your <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth>.

name: Outlaw's Grit
description: After using a dash, blink, or teleport you gain <scaleArmor>@ResistsPerStack@ Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> up to @MaxResistTooltipOnly@ at @MaxStacks@ stacks.

name: Don't Blink
description: Deal more damage to enemies the faster you are than them.

name: Shadow Runner
description: After using a dash, leap, blink, or teleport Ability or exiting <stealth>Stealth</stealth>, gain <speed>@spell.Augment_ShadowRunner:MSAmount@ Move Speed</speed> for @spell.Augment_ShadowRunner:BuffDuration@ seconds.

name: Infernal Conduit
description:
Your Abilities apply an infinitely stacking Burn, dealing magic damage over time.

Your Burn effects reduce your basic Ability Cooldowns.

name: ADAPt
description: Convert <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD> to <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP>. Gain <scaleAP>@APAmp*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.

name: Back To Basics
description: Gain increased Ability Damage, <healing>Healing</healing>, <shield>Shielding</shield>, and Ability Haste, but you <keywordMajor>cannot use your Ultimate Ability</keywordMajor>.

name: Prismatic Egg
description:
Gain @KillStackCredit@ stack on takedown, once per champion per round.

Every @RequiredKillCount@ stacks, this hatches into a Prismatic Anvil and @RerollsToGrant@ bonus reroll.

name: Clothesline
description: There is a tether between you and your partner that deals constant <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies inside.

name: Don't Chase
description: You become Ghosted and leave a trail of poisonous gas behind you, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies inside.

name: Soul Siphon
description: Gain <crit>@CritChance*100@% Crit Chance</crit> and <lifeSteal>@HealPercentage*100@% lifesteal on <crit>Critical Strikes</crit></lifeSteal>.

name: Gamba Anvil
description:
Gain @GoldBonus@ gold and reduce the price of all anvils.

Prismatic Anvils: @PrismaticCostReduction@
Legendary Anvils: @LegendaryCostReduction@
Stat Anvils: @StatCostReduction@

Items acquired from anvils resell for 500 gold less.

name: Divine Intervention
description: @InitalDelay@ seconds into combat, call upon a protective star that slowly descends upon you. When it lands, you and nearby allies become <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a few seconds. Then <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> this every @BaseCD@ seconds.

name: Thread the Needle
description: Gain @PercentPen*100@% <physicalDamage>Armor Penetration</physicalDamage> and <magicDamage>Magic Penetration</magicDamage>.

name: Bread And Cheese
description: Your @spell3KeyBind@ gains @EAbilityHaste@ Ability Haste.

name: Impassable
description: Gain the <spellName>Aftershock</spellName> and <spellName>Glacial Augment</spellName> Keystone Runes.

name: Pandora's Box
description: Transmute all of your augments into random Prismatic augments.

name: Extendo-Arm
description: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> fire a Blitzcrank hook every 12 seconds at a nearby enemy champion.

name: Slow Cooker
description: Every second, apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to nearby enemy champions, scaling with your <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth>.

name: Die Another Day
description:
Gain the Die Another Day Summoner Spell.

Die Another Day creates a zone where no unit can die for 4 seconds.

name: 404 Augment Not Found
description:
How did you find this?!?!?

Gain @HatsToGrant@ hats.

name: Dual Wield
description: When you Attack, fire a bolt that deals @AttackReduction*100@% damage and applies your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects at @OnHitMod*100@% effectiveness. Gain <attackSpeed>@AttackSpeed*100@% total Attack Speed</attackSpeed>.

name: Augment 405
description: Gain @DamageAmpPerHat*100@% damage per hat you're wearing.

name: Spirit Link
description: @DamageRedirectPercentage*100@% of damage dealt to your ally is redirected to you, and <healing>@HealCopyPercentage*100@% of healing</healing> they receive is also given to you.

name: Deathtouch
description:
Attacking enemy champions grants permanent Cursed Power and deal additional magic damage based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

name: Quest: Angel of Retribution
description:
Requirement: Heal or prevent @RequirementAmount@ damage to allies.

Reward: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% Attack Speed, and your Attacks deal additional magic damage equal to @HealPowerToDamageConversion*100@% Heal/Shield Power.

name: Contract Killer
description: Each round, mark an opponent to take @spell.Augment_ContractKiller:DamageAmp*100@% more damage and grant an extra @spell.Augment_ContractKiller:Gold@ gold on death.

name: Goredrink
description: Gain <lifeSteal>@Omnivamp*100@% Omnivamp</lifeSteal>.

name: We'll Be Right Back
description:
Gain Time Stop Summoner Spell.

Time Stop: ALL nearby champions are put in Stasis. The Stasis is shorter on you, and during it you Heal based on missing Health.

name: Quest: Rite Of The Forge God
description:
Requirement: Purchase @AnvilsReqToComplete@ Item Anvils.

Reward: All of your items become Masterwork, increasing their stats by @ItemPercentAmp*100@%.

name: First-Aid Kit
description: Gain <healing>@HealShieldAmp*100@% Heal and Shield Power</healing>.

name: OK Boomerang
description: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> throw a boomerang at a nearby enemy every @BaseCooldown@s.

name: Hybrid
description:
When you deal damage with an Attack, your next Ability deals @AbilityBoost*100@% increased damage.

When you deal damage with an Ability, your next Attack deals @AttackBoost*100@% increased damage.

name: Hive Mind
description: Start each round with @StartingBees@ Bee, gain additonal Bees by harvesting flowers. Damaging an enemy champion sends a Bee dealing @BeeDamage@ magic damage over @DebuffDuration@ seconds on arrival, before returning to you.

name: Quest: Three Sacred Treasures
description:
Requirement: Possess Infinity Edge, Perplexity, and Hextech Gunblade.

Reward: Yunara's Attacks are replaced with lasers that deal mixed damage.

name: Juice Box
description: Each round, you and your teammate get an additional Juice for free.

name: Scopiest Weapons
description: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

name: Slime Time
description: Every few seconds <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> a burst slime from your body, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to nearby enemies. If you hit a champion, secrete a blob that heals you when walked over.

name: Dreadbringer
description:
Gain an aura that continuously harvests permanent Cursed Power per enemy champion inside. Gain max Health based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

name: Calculated Risk
description:
Instantly consume your remaining rerolls, you can no longer reroll.

Select a Gold Augment, if at least @PrismaticThreshold@ rerolls were consumed this way, empower this to select a Prismatic Augment instead.

name: Stackosaurus Rex
description: When you gain permanent <keywordMajor>Stacks</keywordMajor> of an Ability, gain @StackModifier*100@% more!

name: escAPADe
description: Convert <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> to <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD>. Gain <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% Attack Damage</scaleAD>.

name: Fey Magic
description: Damaging with your Ultimate <status>Polymorphs</status> enemies for a few seconds.

name: Firebrand
description: Your Attacks apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}, dealing damage over time.

name: Doomsayer
description:
Hitting enemy champions with abilities grants you permanent Cursed Power. Gain Adaptive Force based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

name: Flashy
description: Your Flash has @FlashAmmoTooltip@ Ammo and a @FlashCooldown@ second Cooldown.

name: Nesting Doll
description:
You automatically begin Reviving yourself after @ReviveArmTime@ seconds and you can be Revived an additional time. Each time you Revive, come back smaller and with reduced max Health.

When you revive, Knockback enemies around you.

name: Tap Dancer
description: Your Attacks grant you <speed>@MSPerHit@ Move Speed</speed>, stacking infinitely. Gain <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed> equal to @MSToASConversion*10000@% of your <speed>Move Speed</speed>.

name: Fan the Hammer
description: When you Attack, fire @AdditionalBolts@ additional bolts that each deal <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> based on distance travelled. Has a per direction Cooldown.

name: Tormentor
description: <status>Immobilizing</status> or <status>Grounding</status> enemy champions applies a <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> that deals damage over time, stacking infinitely.

name: Minionmancer
description: Your summons gain @MinionSizeIncrease*100@% increased size, health, and damage.

name: Multitool
description: Add Multitool to your inventory. During each Shopping Phase, choose 1 of 5 random items, and Multitool becomes that item for the next combat round.

name: Tank Engine
description: Gain @SizeIncrement*100@% increase in size and <scaleHealth>@MaxHPIncrement*100@% bonus Health</scaleHealth> per takedown.

name: Ethereal Weapon
description: Your Abilities apply {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects. 1 second cooldown per target.

name: Omni Soul
description: Gain 3 random Dragon Souls.

name: Dawnbringer's Resolve
description: Upon dropping below @HealthThreshold*100@% Health, heal for @HealAmount*100@% max Health over 3 seconds.

name: Hold Very Still
description:
Gain Guerrilla Warfare.

After not moving for @HoldStillDuration@ seconds, turn Invisibile until you move. When you exit this Invisibility,your first hit deals bonus magic damage gain @BonusAS@ Attack Speed and @BonusMS*100@% decaying Move Speed.

name: From Beginning to End
description: Gain the <spellName>First Strike</spellName> and <spellName>Dark Harvest</spellName> Keystone Runes.

name: Panic Room
description: Once per combat, when you would die, instead turn into a wisp, set yourself to <scaleHealth>@HealthLock*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, and travel to a random spot in the arena.

name: Parasitic Mutation
description:
Every round this mutates into one of your opponent's augments.

Only mutates into augments you could roll.

name: Can't Touch This
description: Casting your Ultimate makes you <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a short duration.

name: Snowball Fight!
description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Mark.

Mark throws a snowball that marks the first enemy hit and deals damage. Recast to dash to the marked enemy.

name: It's Critical
description: Gain <crit>@CritChance*100@% Crit Chance</crit>.

name: Blood Brother
description:
Gain Darius's Passive Hemorrhage.

Attacks and damaging Abilities cause the target to Hemorrhage, dealing @BleedDamagePerStack@ physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

Draven gains @NoxianMightBonusAD@ Attack Damage at @MaxStacks@ Hemorrhage stacks.

name: Ultimate Unstoppable
description: After using your Ultimate, you become immune to crowd control for @UnstoppableDuration@ seconds. (@Cooldown@ second Cooldown).

name: Recursion
description: Gain @AbilityHaste@ Ability Haste.

name: Stats on Stats on Stats!
description: Gain @AmountOfStatAnvils@ Stat Anvils!

name: Deft
description: Gain @AttackSpeed*100@% <speed>Attack Speed</speed>.

name: Goliath
description: Become large, gaining <scaleHealth>@HealthAmp*100@% Health</scaleHealth> and <scaleAP>@ADAmp*100@% Adaptive Force</scaleAP>.

name: Juice Press
description:
Juices grant you and your teammate additional effects.

Buff juices cost @PriceReduction*100@% less.

name: Leg Day
description: Gain <speed>@MovementSpeed@ Movement Speed</speed> and <speed>@SlowResist*100@% Slow Resist</speed>.

name: Trailblazer
description: Dashing or Blinking applies a <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> to a nearby enemy that deals damage over time, stacking infinitely.

name: Accelerating Sorcery
description: Using Abilities grant you infinitely stacking Ability Haste, this resets each round.

name: Righteous Fury
description: <healing>Healing</healing> or <Shield>Shielding</Shield> increases your Ability damage by @SpellDamagePerStack*100@%, stacking infinitely for the round.

name: Orbital Laser
description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Orbital Laser.

After a delay, call down an orbital laser that deals @DamagetoChampions*100@% max Health true damage plus @TotalDamageOverTimeTooltip@ magic damage over @GroundDuration@ seconds.

name: Energetic
description: Gain <keyword>Energized</keyword> twice as quickly. Triggering <keyword>Energized</keyword> fires a <keywordMajor>Magic Missile</keywordMajor>, dealing up to <trueDamage>@MaxHealthDamagePerMissile*100@% max Health true damage</trueDamage> based on distance travelled.

name: Mystic Punch
description: {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} reduce the cooldown of your abilities by @CooldownRefund@ seconds.

name: Homeguard
description: Gain <speed>@spell.Augment_Homeguard:MovementSpeed*100@% Move Speed</speed>, disabled for @spell.Augment_Homeguard:DisableCooldown@ seconds after taking damage.

name: Null Augment
description: Null

name: Hat Trick
description:
Instantly gain @HatsToGrant@ hats, and reduce the price of Cappa Juice by @HatTrickPriceReduction@.
Taking damage that would reduce your Health below @LowHealthThreshold*100@% gain @MoveSpeedBoostPercent*100@% Move Speed and a @ShieldHealth@ shield for @ShieldDuration@, but lose one hat. @Cooldown@ second Cooldown.

name: Heavy Hitter
description: Your Attacks deal additional <physicalDamage>physical damage</physicalDamage> equal to @HealthPercent*100@% of your <scaleHealth>max Health.</scaleHealth>

name: Rabble Rousing
description: Using an Ability restores <healing>@HealAmount@ Health</healing>.

name: Giant Slayer
description: Become tiny, gain <speed>Move Speed</speed>, and bonus damage to champions based on how much larger they are than you.

name: Transmute: Prismatic
description: Gain a random Prismatic Augment.

name: Frozen Foundations
description:
Gain the Frozen Foundations Summoner Spell.

Frozen Foundations summons a wall of ice at a location.

name: Critical Healing
description: Your <healing>Heals</healing> and <shield>Shields</shield> can Critically Strike for @CritHeal*100@% bonus amount. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

name: Transmute: Gold
description: Gain a random Gold Augment.

name: Apex Inventor
description:
Gain @ItemHaste@ Item Haste (equivalent to @TooltipCDR@% Item CDR).

Item Haste reduces the cooldown %i:cooldown% of all Item Abilities.

name: Mirror Image
description: When you drop below <scaleHealth>@HealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, briefly become <keywordStealth>Invisible</keywordStealth> and create 4 clones of yourself.

name: Desecrator
description:
Immobilizing enemy champions grants you permanent Cursed Power. Gain Armor and Magic Resistance based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

name: All For You
description: Your <healing>Heals</healing> and <shield>Shields</shield> are @HealShieldAmp*100@% stronger when used on an ally.

name: Keystone Conjurer
description: Gain the <spellName>Summon Aery</spellName> and <spellName>Arcane Comet</spellName> Keystone Runes.

name: Laser Eyes
description: There is a laser in the direction you are facing that deals continuous <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage>.

name: Spirit Infusion
description: Gain Heal and Shield Power, increased when low Health. On Ultimate cast, double your Heal and Shield Power.

name: Stats on Stats!
description: Gain @AmountOfStatAnvils@ Stat Anvils!

name: Dashing
description: Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities gain @Haste@ Ability Haste.

name: Fire Sale
description: Instantly sell all your non-quest items for @SellValueTooltip@% of their direct buy price. Great for all those discounted anvils.

name: Lightning Strikes
description:
Gain @TotalASValue*100@% total Attack Speed.

At @Breakpoint1@ Attacks per second, deal additional magic damage {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}.

name: Unshackled
description: You can cast <spellName>Hijack</spellName> on your partner. Gain @UltimateHaste@ Ultimate Haste.

name: Repulsor
description: On dropping below @HealthThreshold1*100@% or @HealthThreshold2*100@% Health, nearby enemies are <status>Knocked Back</status>.

name: Skilled Sniper
description: Hitting an enemy with a non-Ultimate Ability at far range reduces its Cooldown to @ReducedCooldown@ seconds (@PeriodicReductionAmount@ for periodic Abilities).

name: Parasitic Relationship
description: You <healing>heal for @HealPercent*100@%</healing> of the damage dealt by your partner.

name: Restart
description: Your non-Ultimate Abilities <keywordMajor>Automatically</keywordMajor> refresh every @CoolDown@ seconds.

name: Draw Your Sword
description: You are now melee. Gain <physicalDamage>@BonusAD*100@% Attack Damage</physicalDamage>, <healing>@BonusHP*100@% Health</healing>, <attackSpeed>@BonusAS*100@% Attack Speed</attackSpeed>, <lifesteal>@BonusLifesteal*100@% Lifesteal</lifesteal>, and <speed>@BonusMS*100@% Move Speed</speed> (each further increased based on Attack Range lost).

name: Restless Restoration
description: You constantly <healing>heal</healing> while moving.

name: Dive Bomber
description: Your team's first death each round explodes, dealing <trueDamage>massive damage true damage</trueDamage>.

name: Sacrifice: For Gold
description:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Gold Augment and restore your health.

name: Blunt Force
description: Gain <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% Attack Damage</scaleAD>.

name: Oathsworn
description:
Replace Summoner Flee with Fate's Call.

Fate's Call making your ally Untargetable for up to 4 seconds. your ally can launch themself out, Knocking Back enemies.

name: Flashbang
description: When you Flash, there is an explosion around you dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Slowing</status> enemies hit. Additionally, Flash resets every round.

name: Aim for the Head
description:
Gain @CritChanceBonus*100@% Critical Strike Chance and @CritDamageBonus*100@% Critical Strike Damage. Your Critical Strike Chance is capped at @CritChanceCeiling*100@%.

Convert @CritChanceToDamageRatio*100@% of Critical Strike Chance above @CritChanceCeiling*100@% into Critical Strike Damage.

name: Summoner's Roulette
description: Replace your Summoner Spells with random ones. When you use a Summoner Spell, replace it with another random one on a @Cooldown@ second Cooldown.

name: Sacrifice: For Silver
description: After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus <keywordMajor>Silver Augment</keywordMajor>.

name: Shrink Ray
description: Your Attacks reduce an enemy's damage by @DamageReduction*100@% for 3 seconds.

name: Castle
description:
Gain the Castle Summoner Spell.

Castle: Swap places with your ally, gaining Move Speed and a Shield.

name: Quest: Steel Your Heart
description:
Requirement: Possess Heartsteel with @StackThreshold@+ stacks.

Reward: Multiply your Heartsteel stacks by @StackMultiplication@. Increase your Health Regeneration by @StacktoRegenConversion*100@% of your Heartsteel stacks.

name: Executioner
description: Deal @BonusDamage*100@% more damage to enemies below @HealthThreshold*100@% health. Reset your basic abilities on takedown.

name: Courage of the Colossus
description: Gain @TotalShield@ Shield after Immobilizing or Grounding an enemy champion.

name: Fruits of Your Labor
description: Power Flowers are @AmpAmountTooltip@% more effective on you and are shared with your ally.

name: Infernal Soul
description: You gain the Infernal Soul, dealing bonus damage when you hit enemies with Abilities or Attacks.

name: Combo Master
description: Gain the <spellName>Electrocute</spellName> and <spellName>Phase Rush</spellName> Keystone Runes.

name: Dark Blessing
description:
Healing/Shielding grants you permanent Cursed Power. Gain Ability Haste based on your Cursed Power.

The max Cursed Power you can gain per round scales with total Curse sources between you and your ally.

name: Mind to Matter
description: Increase <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth> by half of your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana>.

name: It's Killing Time
description: After casting your Ultimate, mark all enemy champions for death. While marked, store a percentage of damage dealt to them, and detonate the damage when the mark ends.

name: Wisdom of Ages
description:
Gain 1 level now, and 1 bonus level every other round. Your level cap is removed.

If taken as your second Augment, instead gain 3 levels.

name: Sacrifice: For Prismatic
description:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Prismatic Augment and restore your health.

name: Now You See Me
description:
Gain the Now You See Me Summoner Spell.

Now You See Me teleports you back to the starting position of your last Movement Ability.

name: Perseverance
description: Gain hugely increased <healing>Health Regen</healing>, even further increased at low <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>.

name: Jeweled Gauntlet
description: Your Abilities can Critically Strike. Gain @CritChance*100@% Crit Chance.

name: And My Axe!
description:
Autocast:
Periodically throws an axe at the nearest opponent, dealing damage, slowing, and shredding their armor and magic resist. The cooldown is reduced if the axe is picked up.
